groups.description: Screen SurrealDB write buffer size tiers around the detected default.
caveats: Memory impact is coupled with MAX_WRITE_BUFFER_NUMBER and SurrealDB's write buffer manager.

groups.description: Screen SurrealDB target file size base tiers.
caveats: Interacts with L0 triggers, max bytes for level base, and compaction pressure.

groups.description: Screen compaction readahead values including SurrealDB's 256 KiB default and larger legacy/rx2 values.
caveats: SurrealDB's current default is fixed 256 KiB even if stale comments mention dynamic values.

groups.description: Test background jobs and subcompactions around the detected CPU/memory-derived defaults.
caveats: MAX_BACKGROUND_JOBS and increase_parallelism are related but not the same knob.

groups.description: Compare SurrealDB's table/index/filter layout against selected alternatives.
caveats: Prefix extractor semantics and SurrealDB key layout are not modeled by db_bench.

groups.description: Test BlobDB enablement and blob-file shape for large-value workloads.
dependencies: VALUE_SIZE >= MIN_BLOB_SIZE for meaningful BlobDB separation
caveats: SurrealDB disables blob files below 1 GiB effective memory.

groups.description: Model the RocksDB portions of SurrealDB WAL behavior.
caveats: Grouped commit timeout, wait threshold, and max batch size require a SurrealDB workload harness.
